texto: You have control over doing your respective duty, but no control or claim over the result. Fear of failure, from being emotionally attached to the fruit of work, is the greatest impediment to success because it robs efficiency by constantly disturbing the equanimity of mind.
explicacao: Citação de Ramananda Prasad sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “You have control over doing your respective duty, but no control or claim over the result. Fear o…” articula coragem, duty, ii-47 em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e duty.
